case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LI, JING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JING
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-07-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-16-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $437.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, JING $277.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $302.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-16-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
